meta.method: Burrows Delta over top-300 MFW (corpus norm from known docs); score = -Delta(unknown z, mean known z); AUC over Y/N labels; accuracy at the median-score threshold (label-balanced sets)
meta.note: Sanity check only: PAN14 essays are cross-topic by construction; novels corpus is cross-genre. Verification (not closed-set attribution), so numbers are not comparable to E2 gates.
